name: Georgia official pharmaceutical reference-price catalogue
executiveSummary: Current legal and official-search evidence confirms that Georgia maintains a pharmaceutical reference-price catalogue, but a reusable current catalogue file or record endpoint was not independently retrieved. The ministry surface returned an access challenge to command-line validation.
updateCadence: Established by ministerial acts; current machine publication cadence not validated
accessSummary: Legal page and search evidence only; no current XLSX/CSV/API payload retrieved. The ministry catalogue surface returned HTTP 403/Cloudflare to the automated check.
license: Unclear; no reusable catalogue payload or explicit data license validated

accessPoints.label: Ministry website
accessPoints.authentication: Public surface returned an access challenge to this test

caveats: Do not substitute medicine authorization records for price records
Do not treat search-engine snippets as a retrieved catalogue
The legal existence of a catalogue does not establish machine access or reuse rights
reliability: Official legal basis was located; data payload was not retrieved

name: Georgia pharmacy-level medicine stock and availability
executiveSummary: No official public source was validated for branch-level current medicine inventory, stock counts, restock times, or reservation availability. The official pharmacy register identifies facilities and authorization status only; commercial pharmacy storefronts are not a public civic feed.
accessSummary: Official facility and product registers were checked; neither contains branch stock. Commercial storefront/session data was not reverse-engineered.
license: Not applicable; no public dataset found
caveats: Product registration is not retail availability
Facility status is not opening status or stock
Commercial e-commerce output may be personalized, stale, or contractually restricted
reliability: Official product and facility schemas were live-tested and contained no stock fields

name: Legacy Tbilisi municipal ideas domain
executiveSummary: The historical idea.tbilisi.gov.ge host did not resolve. The current operational surface is the nationwide idea.municipal.gov.ge client, catalogued separately with a strict personal-data boundary.
accessSummary: DNS resolution failed for the legacy host.
caveats: Do not use the dead host as the current petition source
Historical links may not resolve
reliability: DNS failure observed in the research session

name: Tbilisi municipal service-request and complaint feed
executiveSummary: No public structured feed was validated for 311-style requests, complaint status, SLA, closure outcome, or district workload. Public submission/contact channels and map layers do not establish an open request dataset.
provider: Tbilisi City Hall / municipal service entities
accessSummary: Public municipal sites and the municipal platform were checked; only idea/petition records were validated, not service tickets.
caveats: Petitions/ideas are not service requests
Authenticated case status is private
Addresses and complaint text would require strong privacy controls even if a feed existed
reliability: No reusable public ticket endpoint was validated

name: Tbilisi shelters and social-service live capacity
executiveSummary: No public source was validated for current shelter beds, queue length, appointment availability, referrals, intake eligibility, or case status. Public program descriptions and internal eHealth/social modules do not make beneficiary operations public.
provider: Tbilisi municipal and Georgian social-service bodies
accessSummary: Public program/module information only; no capacity or queue records retrieved. Authenticated and beneficiary-level routes were not probed.
license: Not applicable; no public dataset found
caveats: Program existence is not current capacity
Beneficiary and case data are highly sensitive
Annual aggregates cannot be presented as live availability
reliability: Public access boundary was checked; no record feed validated

name: Tbilisi building-permit and zoning decision operational feed
executiveSummary: Public municipal planning/map surfaces exist, but no stable reusable record feed was validated for submitted permits, review stage, decision, conditions, applicant, parcel, or appeal status. Map/catalog visibility is insufficient for a record-level schema.
provider: Tbilisi City Hall / municipal architecture and planning services
accessSummary: Official planning/service surfaces were located, but no exact reusable request/response contract was validated in scope.

accessPoints.label: Tbilisi architecture service surface
accessPoints.authentication: Public information plus service workflows; exact record access not validated

caveats: A zoning map is not a permit decision log
Application documents can contain personal data
Do not claim record completeness from visible map layers
reliability: No current reusable record response was retrieved

name: eAuction direct live-bidding service
executiveSummary: The eAuction client references a live bidding service, but direct read attempts without a valid auction session returned HTTP 400 and a system-error message. Public lot pages remain usable; the session-bound bidding protocol is not a public API.
accessSummary: POST attempts using empty/zero/invalid SessionKey values returned HTTP 400 with a Georgian system-error response. No further probing was performed.
license: Not applicable; no reusable access validated

accessPoints.label: Public lot portal
accessPoints.notes: Use public cards/detail pages; do not present the session service as an API.

caveats: Bidding is transactional and session-bound
Do not automate bids or bypass authentication
Public bid-count summaries are available on lot pages and catalogued separately
reliability: Rejected calls consistently returned HTTP 400/system error

name: Parliament voting-results JSON backend
executiveSummary: The Parliament web client references JSON routes for voting sessions and deputies, but repeated final validation returned HTTP 500. Official rendered/indexed pages are catalogued as Page-verified; the JSON backend should not be treated as dependable until revalidated.
accessSummary: Session-list and detail JSON requests returned HTTP 500 Server Error during final validation; parameter variants behaved inconsistently earlier in the session.

accessPoints.label: Official rendered voting pages
accessPoints.notes: Use as the current fallback and archive page output.

caveats: Undocumented backend
Transient 200 responses earlier in research did not remain reproducible
Do not build ingestion that silently treats 500 or empty output as no votes
reliability: Final repeated calls failed; official page content remained discoverable and was catalogued separately
